parameters.content:
## Before you activate this workflow

1. In Gmail: create a filter on `from:receipt@trainingpeaks.com` that applies a label (e.g. `TP-Subscriptions`) AND checks 'Skip the Inbox (Archive it)'. This is required -- without it, this workflow's IMAP poller and the CoachMatch workflow's poller both watch the inbox and will race on the \Seen flag, silently dropping emails at random.
2. Enable 'Show in IMAP' for that label under Gmail Settings -> Labels.
3. Set the 'Email Trigger (IMAP)' node's mailbox parameter to that label's IMAP folder name (usually just the label name).
4. Reuse the same 'IMAP account' and 'Twenty API' credentials as the other workflows.
5. `customerType` (ALL_ACCESS/PLAN_BUYER/1_1_COACHING), `leadSource` (added WEBSITE + ALL_ACCESS_SUBSCRIPTION), and `leadStatus` are all confirmed real enum values as of July 2026 (see ai-infrastructure-documentation.md). `preferredLanguage: ENGLISH` is still NOT confirmed (only SPANISH/PORTUGUESE have been seen in a real API response) -- verify on the first real English-subscriber test and fix if Twenty rejects it.
6. Members-area token revocation on churn is a placeholder (see the sticky note near 'Mark Churned in Twenty') -- the auth/token system isn't built yet.
7. Test with 'Listen for Test Event' before switching this Active.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ customerType: 'ALL_ACCESS', leadStatus: 'WON_CUSTOMER', purchaseDate: new Date().toISOString(), planPurchased: $('Map Language + Build Twenty Fields').item.json.subscription_name, preferredLanguage: $('Map Language + Build Twenty Fields').item.json.preferredLanguage, churnDate: null }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ name: { firstName: $('Map Language + Build Twenty Fields').item.json.firstname, lastName: $('Map Language + Build Twenty Fields').item.json.lastname || '-' }, emails: { primaryEmail: $('Map Language + Build Twenty Fields').item.json.email }, customerType: 'ALL_ACCESS', leadStatus: 'WON_CUSTOMER', leadSource: 'OTHER', purchaseDate: new Date().toISOString(), planPurchased: $('Map Language + Build Twenty Fields').item.json.subscription_name, preferredLanguage: $('Map Language + Build Twenty Fields').item.json.preferredLanguage }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Map Language + Build Twenty Fields').item.json.firstname }}, bienvenido/a a All-Access
parameters.text:
=NOTE: placeholder copy -- rewrite per language once EN/PT welcome copy exists, and add the members-area link + credentials paragraph once that system is built (task: password-gated members area).

Hola {{ $('Map Language + Build Twenty Fields').item.json.firstname }},

Gracias por suscribirte a All-Access. Este correo va a incluir pronto: instrucciones para aplicar cualquiera de los planes a tu cuenta de TrainingPeaks, los links a las guias incluidas, y el acceso al area de miembros.

Ivan Koch - Triaperformance

nodes.name: TODO -- token revocation not built yet

parameters.content: Once the members-area auth/token system exists (see task: password-gated members area), add a step here that revokes this person's token so their members-area access actually stops. Right now this only updates Twenty's churnDate -- it does not touch any access control yet.
